subcodes.first_line: He is the Most Blessed, the Most Exalted! Verily, though it be but the weight of a mustard seed, and though it be hidden within a rock or in the heavens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قوله تبارک و تعالی انها ان تک مثقال حبه من خردل فتکن فی صخره او فی السموات
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution
